utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items requested in the format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. That makes 6 items total. Next, check the final property solution to see if all items are present. The solution includes: property (details and price provided), financing (terms given), legal_services (provider, cost, description), moving_services (provider, cost, description), setup_services (provider, cost, description), and total_budget (breakdown of upfront and ongoing costs). All 6 items are present. Then check if each is fully specified: property includes type, address, size, amenities, and price—complete; financing includes type, LTV, down payment, interest rate, amortization, term, monthly payment—complete; legal_services has provider, cost, and services—complete; moving_services has provider, cost, and services—complete; setup_services has provider, cost, and services—complete; total_budget has breakdown with all relevant costs—complete. Therefore, all items are fully specified.
